title: Specklinia pristeoglossa
taxonomy: Specklinia pristeoglossa is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is classified within the tribe Epidendreae, and further within the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. This classification places it within the genus Specklinia, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The species is native to Central and South America and is characterized by its unique yellowish-green coloration. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Specklinia pristeoglossa shares characteristics with other orchids, such as its modified leaves and showy flowers.
